title: JustTimm's Enhanced Hud
description: JustTimm's Enhanced Hud is a resource pack that changes Minecraft’s hud, giving it more detail, improve the colors, while staying true to the vanilla style.
body:
![Header](https://i.imgur.com/62ySyL9.png) [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/DYCxx4SI?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=1BD96A&labelColor=494B54&color=1BD96A)](https://modrinth.com/project/justtimms-enhanced-hud) [![Modrinth Followers](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/followers/DYCxx4SI?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&labelColor=494B54&color=1BD96A)](https://modrinth.com/project/justtimms-enhanced-hud) [![YouTube](https://img.shields.io/youtube/channel/subscribers/UCV4vHsM-p6GXsJTU-S7GSLQ?style=for-the-badge&logo=youtube&label=YouTube&labelColor=494B54&color=FF0033)](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCV4vHsM-p6GXsJTU-S7GSLQ) [![TikTok](https://img.shields.io/badge/TikTok-000000?style=for-the-badge&logo=tiktok&logoColor=white)](https://www.tiktok.com/@justtimms_resource_packs) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/738674569195290734?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white&label=Discord&labelColor=494B54&color=5865F2)](https://discord.com/invite/runTSv2) JustTimm's Enhanced Hud is a resource pack that changes Minecraft’s hud, giving it more detail, improve the colors, while staying true to the vanilla style. The pack improves key UI elements like: - ❤️ Health *(Hearts)* - 🛡️ Armor Icons - 🍗 Hunger Bar - 🌊 Air Bubbles - 📌 Hotbat/Locator Bar - 🏇 Jump Bar
🔧 Supported Mods JustTimm's Enhanced Hud supports the following mod(s): - [Appleskin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) Do you want to see more mods supported? You can submit them in my [Discord server](https://discord.com/invite/runTSv2) in the feedback channel!
Check out JustTimm's Enhanced Hud on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/project/justtimms-enhanced-hud) and [PlanetMinecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/justtimm-s-enhanced-hud/)! --- ## ❓ FAQ
Q: Do I need OptiFine for this pack to work? A: No, this pack works in vanilla Minecraft. OptiFine is not required.
Q: Some of these textures look like the ones in JustTimm's Vanilla Additions? A: That's right. I stopped updating Vanilla Additions because it got hard to maintain and confusing for some players with all the add-onns and additions. Now, some of its features live in separate, easier-to-use resource packs.

--- ## 🤔Terms of use You are **free** to: - Use this pack on your server. - Alter the pack for personal use. - Combine with other packs for personal use and play. - Use this pack in YouTube videos. _(Credit is appreciated)_ You are **NOT** allowed to: - Claim ownership over the textures/models in this pack. - Reupload the entire resource pack elsewhere. - Redistribute unedited individual assets from the pack without permission and credit. - Redistribute edited assets from the pack without permission and credit. --- ## 🚧 Other Projects [![Button](https://i.imgur.com/rGYl5Vu.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-enhanced-colors) [![Button](https://i.imgur.com/Y8w9ZeH.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-lightsaber-workshop)
